items.caption: A close-up of a black and white alarm clock with a red "gunshot" label prominently displayed on its face. the clock has a classic design with black hands and numbers, and it's set against a blurred background that suggests an indoor setting. the text on the clock implies a countdown to an imminent event, possibly a metaphorical or literal "gunshot" in a short period of time. the image has a 3d rendering quality and is royalty-free.
